name: sera-speaks
prompt: Close-up. Brunette woman standing at window RIGHT of frame, still facing glass, her back to room. Her profile visible, city lights through window ahead. She speaks without turning — quiet, controlled. Cool light from window on her face, warm room light rim-lighting her from behind LEFT. Pale eyes reflected faintly in glass. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: She wanted you to say yes. She wanted you to come with us.

name: us
prompt: Close-up, tight on face. Dark-haired man receiving the word "us." Internal impact — landed harder than anything Maren said. Subtle crack in composure, dark eyes showing something breaking. Warm amber light from LEFT, shadows on right. Background: dark radiating impact lines — the word hitting like a blow. Shock moment. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: his-answer
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired man giving the same answer as before — but now it carries weight. Guarded expression holding something he won't name. Same two words, infinitely heavier now. Dark eyes distant. Warm amber light from LEFT. Background: heavy downward pressure lines, weight bearing down. The inadequacy visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: do-you
prompt: Close-up on brunette woman's reflection in window glass RIGHT of frame. City lights visible through, her reflection motionless. The question cuts — asking something deeper than the words. Cool city light through glass, warm room light catching edges. Pale eyes in reflection, watching. Still not turning to face him LEFT. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
